name: Atualiza flow context com leitura PLC
Inicializa Context
Máquina de Estados - Queima Piloto
Roteia escritas p/ nós eth-ip out
Handler Comandos
Distribui Dashboard
func:
var d = msg.payload, p = d.plc;
var plc_ok = flow.get('plc_ok');
return [[
  {payload: d.estado, topic:'estado'},
  {payload: (d.log||[]).join('\n'), topic:'log'},
  {payload: Math.round((p.iTIT_01_Refratario_PV||0)*10)/10, topic:'tit01'},
  {payload: Math.round((p.iTIT_02_Ignicao_PV||0)*10)/10,    topic:'tit02'},
  {payload: Math.round((p.iTIT_03_Cx_Vento_PV||0)*10)/10,   topic:'tit03'},
  {payload: Math.round((p.iFIT_01_GLP_PV||0)*10)/10,        topic:'fit01'},
  {payload: Math.round((p.iFIT_02_Ar_PV||0)*10)/10,         topic:'fit02'},
  {payload: Math.round((p.iPIT_01_GLP_PV||0)*100)/100,      topic:'pit01'},
  {payload: Math.round((p.iPIT_02_Gases_PV||0)*100)/100,    topic:'pit02'},
  {payload: Math.round(p.Parcial_TempoSinterizacao||0),      topic:'sint'},
  {payload: !!p.EMERGENCIA_ALARME1,                          topic:'alarme'},
  {payload: p.iZS_Queimador_Piloto ? '🔥 ON' : '⭕ OFF',    topic:'chama_p'},
  {payload: p.iZS_Queimador_Principal ? '🔥 ON' : '⭕ OFF', topic:'chama_pr'},
  {payload: plc_ok ? '✅ PLC CONECTADO' : '❌ PLC OFFLINE', topic:'plc_sts'},
  {payload: Math.round((p.iFIT_01_GLP_PV||0)*10)/10,        topic:'chart'},
]];
